task.title: Kafka Event Streaming Setup
task.description: Deploy Strimzi operator and Kafka cluster for async event processing

implementation.details:
1. Install Strimzi operator
2. Create Kafka cluster with 1 broker
3. Create topics for notifications.created, notifications.delivered, notifications.failed
4. Configure topic partitions and retention
5. Set up Kafka Connect if needed

task.acceptance_criteria: Kafka cluster is running, topics exist with correct partitions, can produce/consume messages via kafka-console tools
